all.en: Your monthly account statement is now available for review.
all.zh: 您的月度對帳單現已可供查閱。

all.en: The statement period covers transactions from April first to thirtieth.
all.zh: 對帳期間涵蓋四月一日至三十日之交易。

all.en: You can access the document through our secure online banking portal.
all.zh: 您可透過我們的安全網路銀行入口取得文件。

all.en: Paper statements are no longer mailed by default to customers.
all.zh: 本行已不再預設寄送紙本對帳單。

all.en: Please log in using your registered username and password.
all.zh: 請使用您註冊之帳號與密碼登入。

all.en: Multifactor authentication is required for all account holders.
all.zh: 所有帳戶持有人均須通過多因素身分驗證。

all.en: Your opening balance for the period was twelve thousand dollars.
all.zh: 本期之期初餘額為一萬二千美元。

all.en: Total deposits this month amounted to eight thousand seven hundred dollars.
all.zh: 本月存款總計為八千七百美元。

all.en: Total withdrawals and payments reached five thousand four hundred dollars.
all.zh: 本月提款與付款合計為五千四百美元。

all.en: Your ending balance as of the cutoff date was fifteen thousand three hundred.
all.zh: 截止日之期末餘額為一萬五千三百美元。

all.en: Service charges for the month total nine dollars and ninety nine cents.
all.zh: 本月服務費合計為九點九九美元。

all.en: Interest earned on savings products is shown in a separate section.
all.zh: 儲蓄商品所獲利息列示於獨立區塊。

all.en: Pending transactions are not yet reflected in the official statement.
all.zh: 未結算交易尚未反映於正式對帳單。

all.en: Please review every line item carefully for accuracy.
all.zh: 請逐筆仔細核對每項明細之正確性。

all.en: Report any unauthorized activity within sixty days of statement issuance.
all.zh: 如發現未授權之活動，請於對帳單寄發後六十天內通報。

all.en: Suspicious charges should be flagged using the dispute form online.
all.zh: 可疑款項請透過線上爭議表單標記。

all.en: Our fraud team is available around the clock for urgent cases.
all.zh: 本行詐欺防制團隊全天候為緊急個案服務。

all.en: You may download statements in either PDF or CSV format.
all.zh: 您可下載PDF或CSV格式之對帳單檔案。

all.en: Historical statements remain accessible for the past seven years.
all.zh: 過去七年之歷史對帳單均可查閱。

all.en: Email alerts can be configured for low balance thresholds.
all.zh: 可設定電子郵件提醒以監控低額度門檻。

all.en: Mobile app notifications provide real time transaction updates.
all.zh: 行動應用程式可即時推播交易通知。

all.en: Thank you for banking with us throughout this statement period.
all.zh: 感謝您本期間持續使用本行服務。

all.en: Personalized spending summaries help you analyze monthly cash flow trends easily.
all.zh: 個人化消費摘要協助您輕鬆分析每月現金流趨勢。

all.en: Budgeting tools categorize expenditures into housing, transport, food, and entertainment groups.
all.zh: 預算工具將支出歸類為住房、交通、餐飲與休閒等類別。

all.en: Joint account holders receive identical statements through their preferred delivery channel.
all.zh: 聯名帳戶持有人將透過各自偏好之管道收到相同對帳單。

all.en: Business clients may request consolidated statements covering multiple linked accounts.
all.zh: 企業客戶可申請涵蓋多個關聯帳戶之合併對帳單。

all.en: Year end tax documents will be generated automatically each January thirty first.
all.zh: 年度稅務文件將於每年一月三十一日自動產製。

all.en: Branch managers are available for personal consultations by appointment only.
all.zh: 分行經理僅接受預約之個別諮詢服務。

all.en: Customer service representatives can resend statements securely via encrypted email.
all.zh: 客服專員可透過加密郵件安全重發對帳單。

all.en: Account upgrades unlock premium features such as priority service and higher limits.
all.zh: 帳戶升級可解鎖優先服務與更高額度等尊榮功能。

all.en: Refer a friend promotions are valid through the end of the calendar year.
all.zh: 推薦親友優惠活動有效期至本曆年底止。

all.en: Please contact us with any feedback about your online banking experience.
all.zh: 如對網路銀行使用體驗有任何意見，歡迎隨時與我們聯繫。

all.en: Recurring transfers can be scheduled automatically for savings or loan payments.
all.zh: 可設定定期自動轉帳用於儲蓄或貸款還款。

all.en: Overdraft protection links your checking account to an approved backup funding source.
all.zh: 透支保護將您的支票帳戶連結至核准之備援資金來源。

all.en: Mobile check deposit photos must clearly show all four corners and endorsement.
all.zh: 行動支票存款相片須清晰顯示四個角落與背書內容。

all.en: ATM fee refunds apply when using machines outside our partner network.
all.zh: 使用本行夥伴網路以外提款機時可享有手續費退還。

all.en: Travel notifications help prevent your card from being blocked while abroad.
all.zh: 出國通知有助於防止您的卡片於國外遭到鎖卡。

all.en: Wire transfer cutoff times are noted on each transaction confirmation page.
all.zh: 電匯截止時間於每筆交易確認頁面上載明。

all.en: Online banking sessions automatically time out after fifteen minutes of inactivity.
all.zh: 網路銀行連線於閒置十五分鐘後自動登出。

all.en: Account opening for additional products can be completed entirely through digital channels.
all.zh: 其他金融產品之開戶可完全透過數位管道完成。

all.en: Senior accounts offer waived fees and enhanced rates for customers over sixty.
all.zh: 敬老帳戶為六十歲以上客戶提供免手續費與優惠利率。

all.en: Thank you for your continued loyalty throughout your relationship with our bank.
all.zh: 感謝您與本行往來期間持續給予的支持與忠誠。
